repos.inspection_notes: Inspected README, docs workflow/bundle indexes, generated manifests, marketplace manifest, and plugin/skills surfaces. Captured indexed surfaces first for 1,898+ generated skills.

repos.cluster: Best Matches For Codex Config Packages
repos.inspection_notes: Inspected README and SCOPE; captured meta-list/category surfaces.
Inspected README, divisions, tools, and folders; captured division surfaces for 235 source agent files.
Inspected README, agents, course/examples/notebook sections, and industry-use-case sections.
Inspected README, agents.json, agents/README, skills/README, configs, USE-CASES; captured indexed category surfaces.
Inspected README; captured category anchors and Workflows section.
Inspected README, apis.yml, JSON-LD context, vocabulary; apis list empty.
Inspected top-level SKILL.md folders and generated skills catalog; found 149 top-level skill folders.
Inspected plugin manifest, skills directory, README skill overview; found hundreds of medical SKILL.md files.
Inspected root SKILL, template/spec, audit export, and category folders across legal/medical/finance/capital/casedev.
Inspected docs/SKILL-INDEX and plugin packs; captured 66 skill-file index and CRE workflow categories.
Inspected README, AGENTS, manifests, skills, commands, templates, and industry packs.
Inspected README, docs, examples, pipeline/executor/template surfaces; captured document-intelligence workflow surfaces.
Inspected README, docs/index.md, llms.txt, category folders. Found 313 JSON workflow templates; captured categories.
Inspected README and tree. Large/generated repo with 6,260 JSON workflows across lanes/platform folders; captured lanes and major platform/category folders.
